label: ph1-provider-null-guard
prompt: In phantom/src/evolution/engine.ts, introduce optional chaining or a structural null guard to resolveReflectionMode when reading the provider configuration block to prevent runtime crashes when the section is omitted or commented out.

label: ph2-metrics-after-subprocess
prompt: In phantom/src/evolution/engine.ts, modify runDrainPipeline so that session telemetry updates and countedSessionKeys tracking occur only after runReflectionSubprocess returns status === 'ok', preventing metric pollution on failed task attempts.

label: ph3-unique-session-id
prompt: In phantom/src/evolution/engine.ts, replace the hardcoded id: 0 field inside the queued session block in runSingleSession with a dynamically computed unique sequence integer or timestamp offset to avoid task identification collisions.

label: ph4-timeout-clamp
prompt: In phantom/src/agent/runtime.ts, apply a standard safe lower bound logic constraint on timeoutMs calculation (e.g. math clamping or a default fallback) to ensure that configured zero or negative values do not freeze the query pipeline.

label: ph5-session-token-delay
prompt: In phantom/src/agent/runtime.ts, modify the state listener to delay committing the session token via updateSdkSessionId until the active message text segment or valid token payload has been parsed from the execution block.

label: ph6-env-credential-scope
prompt: In phantom/src/agent/runtime.ts, filter and cleanly scope the environment properties block allocated to the query stream execution layer to avoid propagating system environment credentials down to sub-tool processes.

label: ph7-security-context-delimiters
prompt: In phantom/src/agent/runtime.ts, structure wrapWithSecurityContext to enforce crisp data isolation boundaries around user text blocks using random block delimiters or explicit structural schema keys.

label: ph8-active-sessions-persistent
prompt: In phantom/src/agent/runtime.ts, shift the activeSessions constraint out of an in-memory collection and map it onto a clean persistent row lock or lightweight state table to ensure transaction exclusion safety.

label: ph9-apalis-retry-backoff
prompt: In the Rust ETL Apalis tracking loop modules, implement an explicit database state serialization retry strategy with backoff on all job state changes to keep execution tracking aligned during network blips.

label: ph10-graph-promo-row-lock
prompt: In the core graph promotion pipeline logic at scripts/graph_promotion_full_e2e.py (or scripts/graph_promotion_gate.py if that exists), wrap the entity validation and insert operations inside a database row-level lock block using SELECT ... FOR UPDATE to eliminate duplicate graph_item writes from concurrent workers.

label: ph11-input-wal-flush
prompt: In the input capture routing architectures at scripts/input_multiplexer.py (create it if missing), configure the buffering system to stream updates directly to a local WAL or file-backed logging path to preserve data across hardware crashes.

label: ph12-river-outlier-guard
prompt: In scripts/lucidota_river_governor.py (create if missing), incorporate an online data clipping threshold filter or statistical outlier guard to drop extreme telemetry noise before it can distort the streaming ML weights.

label: ph13-absolute-asset-paths
prompt: In phantom/src/evolution/engine.ts, ensure all internal asset lookups explicitly use absolute directory reference patterns derived from the runtime module location (e.g. path.join(__dirname, ...)) to maintain boot consistency regardless of working directory.

label: ph14-abort-listener-cleanup
prompt: In phantom/src/agent/runtime.ts, explicitly ensure that all event listeners attached to the AbortController stream handles are cleanly unwound and freed during exception handling blocks.

label: ph15-runtime-null-guard
prompt: In phantom/src/evolution/engine.ts, introduce a crisp warning or diagnostic log inside runDrainPipeline if the engine detects that the active runtime reference context is unassigned at execution time.
